input.title: Sprint planning - Q2 week 1
input.transcript: Alice: Let's go with the React migration. Bob, can you own the spike by Friday? Bob: Yes, I'll have a doc by EOW. Carol: One blocker - we still need design sign-off on the new dashboard. Alice: I'll ping the design team today.

expected.tldr: Team decided to proceed with the React migration. Bob owns the spike by Friday. Design sign-off on the new dashboard is blocking; Alice will follow up with design today.

action_items.task: Get design sign-off on new dashboard

blockers: Design sign-off on new dashboard pending

input.title: Customer escalation review
input.transcript: Sam: Acme is unhappy with the latency in our v2 API. Priya: Let me check the latest p95 numbers - I think we regressed last week. We should schedule a follow-up once I have data.

expected.tldr: Acme escalated v2 API latency. Priya will pull p95 data and the team will reconvene with that information.

action_items.task: Pull v2 API p95 latency numbers

follow_ups: Reconvene once Priya has the latency data
